prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement consumer group partition assignment strategies: the RangeAssignor, the RoundRobinAssignor, the StickyAssignor, and the CooperativeStickyAssignor, including their AbstractPartitionAssignor base class.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement consumer group partition assignment strategies: the RangeAssignor, the RoundRobinAssignor, the StickyAssignor, and the CooperativeStickyAssignor, including their AbstractPartitionAssignor base class.

params.search_pattern: RangeAssignor OR RoundRobinAssignor OR StickyAssignor OR CooperativeStickyAssignor
